title: PGAA: distribution-aware single-cell perturbation analysis for heterogeneous disease-relevant transcriptional responses
description: PGAA provides Python and R implementations of distribution-aware single-cell perturbation statistics, including a Wasserstein statistic for full expression-distribution shifts and a persistent-homology statistic for responder-associated expression-shape changes. The Communications AI & Computing transfer package frames PGAA as a computational resource for prioritizing heterogeneous transcriptional responses in perturbation screens and patient-derived single-cell analyses.
